---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

**What are you trying to do?**
Describe the use case — what you want to accomplish, not just what you want built.

**How do you work around it today?**
What do you do currently? Is there a workaround?

**What would the ideal solution look like?**
Describe how you'd expect this to work in Stoa.

**Is this a new integration, panel type, or something else?**
<!-- New integration (service name + what data it would show) -->
<!-- New panel type -->
<!-- Change to existing behaviour -->
<!-- UI / UX improvement -->
